overall.description: A cinematic game engine video showing a large bird of prey flying over diverse landscapes. The footage begins with clear skies over lush green forests and lakes, then transitions through a black screen to a misty, fog-covered mountain range where the bird continues its flight through low visibility conditions.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial view of forest lakes and grassland

events.description: bird flaps wings to gain altitude and adjust flight path
screen fades to black indicating transition to different weather or time

agents.ego_description: large bird of prey flying steadily over the landscape with occasional wing flaps

entered.detail: dense green tree cover stretching across the terrain below
calm reflective water bodies scattered through the landscape
white fluffy clouds against bright blue sky
open green meadows between forested areas

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a bird's-eye view of a vibrant summer landscape. The camera follows a large raptor flying over dense green forests interspersed with calm lakes and grassy clearings. The sky is bright blue with scattered clouds, and the bird occasionally flaps its wings to adjust altitude. The scene maintains a steady forward flight path with excellent visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty mountain valley with dense coniferous forest

events.description: emerges from black screen into foggy mountain landscape with reduced visibility
bird banks left and right while navigating through narrow mountain valleys

agents.ego_description: bird gliding through misty mountain terrain, adjusting wings to navigate wind currents and visibility

entered.detail: layered mountain ridges fading into foggy distance
thick white mist obscuring the valleys between peaks
dense coniferous trees covering the mountain slopes
winding dirt road visible through gaps in the fog

segments.scene_description: Following a brief fade to black, the scene transitions to a dramatically different atmosphere. The bird now flies through misty mountain valleys where dense fog layers obscure the terrain below. The lighting becomes diffused and cool-toned, with visibility significantly reduced. The bird banks and adjusts its flight path to navigate the mountainous terrain, with only occasional glimpses of the forested slopes through the mist.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous flight path that transforms from a vibrant, sun-drenched summer landscape into a cold, mist-shrouded mountain range. It begins with a bird's-eye view of a large raptor gliding over dense green forests, calm lakes, and grassy clearings under a bright blue sky. As the camera moves forward, the scene briefly fades to black before emerging into a dramatically different atmosphere of diffused, cool-toned light. The environment then shifts into deep mountain valleys where dense layers of fog obscure the terrain, forcing the bird to bank and adjust its path. Finally, the visibility reduces significantly, leaving only occasional glimpses of forested slopes visible through the thick, enveloping mist.
